 glia                                                                    q quit 
 1 Observations   2 Conflicts (0)   3 Status   4 Help 
Global                                Observations                          
  tab / ⇧tab     Next / previous tab    /              Focus filter input   
  1 / 2 / 3 / 4  Jump to a tab          ↑ / k          Move selection up    
  q / ctrl+c     Quit                   ↓ / j          Move selection down  
                                        enter          Full-screen detail   
Conflicts                               esc            Clear filter / exit  
  w              Accept winner (--keepdetail                                
1)                                      c              Copy canonical_id    
  l              Promote loser  (--   (OSC52)                               
keep 2)                                 f              Cycle kind filter    
  s              Skip conflict          t              Cycle type filter    
                                        g / G          Top / bottom         
                                        r              Reload from disk     
                                                                            
                                      Status                                
                                        s              Run sync (full)      
                                        p              Run sync pull        
                                        P              Run sync push        
                                        r              Refresh status data  
                                                                            

 tab/⇧tab move  1-4 jump  q quit
